name: Fire Code Hazardous Materials Operational Permit (CFC §105 / §5001)
what_it_does: Requires an operational permit from the local fire authority to store, handle, or use hazardous materials above California Fire Code permit-amount thresholds, with related fire-protection and reporting conditions.
jurisdiction: Local fire authority (fire CUPA / fire district)

hypotheses.question: Does on-site hazardous-material storage or use require a fire department operational permit?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: Hazardous materials at or above the CFC permit-amount thresholds require a fire-department operational permit.
